title: Software Update - DFU -  Complete screen
scenario: Firmware update via Device Settings > Software Update shows "Update complete" screen with 100% progress and success message, and tapping "Close" returns to home screen
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap on the desired device name → Device Settings screen
If an update is available, tap 'Update' to begin the firmware update process
Wait for the update to complete
Observe the screen shown after the update finishes
expected: The "Update complete" screen is displayed with the progress bar at 100% and a success message indicating the device has been updated. Tapping "Close" returns the user to the Home screen.
